message:
Rename product from vet to gauntlet

- Package names: vet → gauntlet, vet-ui → gauntlet-ui
- CLI usage: vet run/validate/fanout → gauntlet run/validate/fanout
- Env vars: VET_AGENT_MODEL → GAUNTLET_AGENT_MODEL, VET_FANOUT_MODEL → GAUNTLET_FANOUT_MODEL
- UI: page title and header
- Temp file prefixes in adapters and tests
- Plan doc filenames (content preserved as historical record)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
